text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, we merged 61 PRs this week. The infrastructure got faster, the models got smarter, and you all went on an absolute shipping bender.

## Weekly Update - 2026-03-22

📦 **The Community Bender**
28 new apps were added to the showcase this week. Everything from AI city dioramas and ESP32 generators to interactive storybooks and financial bots. The ecosystem is getting massive.

🧠 **Models & Endpoints**
- Added `Qwen3.5 397B` to the text endpoint (via Fireworks).
- Klein now supports multi-image editing via a new multipart endpoint.
- Vertex AI models now properly respect seed values.
- Empty upstream completions are now correctly rejected with a 502.

⚙️ **Infrastructure & Tiers**
- Spore and Seed tiers now get automated hourly pollen refills. If you burn through your allowance, you won't be waiting long.
- Hardened GitHub username sync on login and fixed KV cache invalidation when API key permissions change.

🖥️ **Frontend & Speed**
- The frontend is noticeably faster. We shipped lazy-loading, chunk splitting, and SWR caching.
- Redesigned the model monitor and pricing tables to make them actually readable.

Keep building.
